verses.text: God is against Gog; He will strike the bow from his hand and his arrows down. Disarmed. The mightiest weapons fail in the day God opposes.
God is against Gog; He will strike the bow from his hand and his arrows down. Disarmed. The mightiest weapons fail in the day God opposes.
God is against Gog; He will strike the bow from his hand and his arrows down. Disarmed. The mightiest weapons fail in the day God opposes.
He shall fall on the mountains, given to the birds and beasts; God will send fire on Magog. Total defeat. The invader perishes far from his spoil.
He shall fall on the mountains, given to the birds and beasts; God will send fire on Magog. Total defeat. The invader perishes far from his spoil.
He shall fall on the mountains, given to the birds and beasts; God will send fire on Magog. Total defeat. The invader perishes far from his spoil.
God will make His holy name known, and the heathen shall know the LORD; 'this is the day.' His name vindicated. Judgment on the foe reveals God to the nations.
God will make His holy name known, and the heathen shall know the LORD; 'this is the day.' His name vindicated. Judgment on the foe reveals God to the nations.
The people shall burn the weapons seven years and spoil their spoilers. Plenty from victory. The instruments of war become fuel of peace.
The people shall burn the weapons seven years and spoil their spoilers. Plenty from victory. The instruments of war become fuel of peace.
Gog is given a place of graves, and seven months they bury the dead 'to cleanse the land.' Purification. God removes every trace of the defeated enemy.
Gog is given a place of graves, and seven months they bury the dead 'to cleanse the land.' Purification. God removes every trace of the defeated enemy.
Gog is given a place of graves, and seven months they bury the dead 'to cleanse the land.' Purification. God removes every trace of the defeated enemy.
Men are appointed to search out and bury the remains, that the land be wholly cleansed. Thoroughness. God's people are to leave no defilement behind.
Men are appointed to search out and bury the remains, that the land be wholly cleansed. Thoroughness. God's people are to leave no defilement behind.
Men are appointed to search out and bury the remains, that the land be wholly cleansed. Thoroughness. God's people are to leave no defilement behind.
Birds and beasts are summoned to God's 'sacrifice,' to eat the flesh of the mighty. A grim feast. The proud become a banquet for the scavengers.
Birds and beasts are summoned to God's 'sacrifice,' to eat the flesh of the mighty. A grim feast. The proud become a banquet for the scavengers.
Birds and beasts are summoned to God's 'sacrifice,' to eat the flesh of the mighty. A grim feast. The proud become a banquet for the scavengers.
Birds and beasts are summoned to God's 'sacrifice,' to eat the flesh of the mighty. A grim feast. The proud become a banquet for the scavengers.
God sets His glory among the heathen, and Israel shall know the LORD 'from that day and forward.' Lasting knowledge. The deliverance fixes their faith for ever.
God sets His glory among the heathen, and Israel shall know the LORD 'from that day and forward.' Lasting knowledge. The deliverance fixes their faith for ever.
The heathen shall learn Israel went captive for their iniquity, when God hid His face. The truth told. Their exile was just, not God's weakness.
The heathen shall learn Israel went captive for their iniquity, when God hid His face. The truth told. Their exile was just, not God's weakness.
Now God will bring again Jacob's captivity and have mercy, jealous 'for my holy name.' Mercy returns. His own glory moves Him to restore His people.
Now God will bring again Jacob's captivity and have mercy, jealous 'for my holy name.' Mercy returns. His own glory moves Him to restore His people.
Now God will bring again Jacob's captivity and have mercy, jealous 'for my holy name.' Mercy returns. His own glory moves Him to restore His people.
They shall know He is the LORD who gathered them, and 'I... have poured out my spirit upon the house of Israel.' Presence assured. God will never again hide His face from His Spirit-filled people.
They shall know He is the LORD who gathered them, and 'I... have poured out my spirit upon the house of Israel.' Presence assured. God will never again hide His face from His Spirit-filled people.
